name: Smoked Chili BBQ Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 cup chipotle peppers in adobo, pureed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, mix the vinegars and spices.
2. Cook over medium heat until reduced by half.
3. In a large pan, sauté onion and garlic lightly in olive oil until often browned.
4. Add sugar and molasses; reduce slightly.
5. Add the vinegar mixture, chipotle peppers, ketchup, and worcestershire sauce.
6. Cook slowly over low heat for 1 hour.
7. Season to taste with salt.
8. Strain through a medium strainer, pressing out juices from onion and garlic.
Makes 3-4 cups
